trigger.description: Fires when a rideshare driver contact is tagged for referral outreach

steps.description: Mark contact as in active Uber/Lyft referral sequence

steps.subject: Earn extra cash reporting parking violations in Phoenix
steps.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

I'm Elliott with Axle Towing. We work with property managers across the Phoenix metro to handle unauthorized parking, and I'm reaching out because rideshare drivers like you are in a unique position to help.

You're already driving through apartment complexes, shopping centers, and commercial lots every day. When you spot parking problems -- vehicles blocking fire lanes, cars parked in restricted zones, lots full of unauthorized vehicles overnight -- that's exactly the kind of thing property managers pay us to handle.

We have a referral program that pays a bonus for every property that signs up for enforcement based on your tip. No selling required. Just let us know what you see.

Interested in hearing more about how it works?

Elliott
Axle Towing
480-288-5526 | info@axletowing.com
axletowing.com
steps.description: Day 0 - Introduce referral program for rideshare drivers

steps.subject: Re: Earn extra cash reporting parking violations in Phoenix
steps.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

Following up on the parking referral program I mentioned. Here's how it works in 4 simple steps:

1. You spot a property with a parking problem while driving
2. Text us the property name and address
3. We reach out to the property manager and pitch enforcement
4. If they sign up, you get a referral bonus

What to look for:
- Apartment complexes with cars parked along curbs or in visitor spots long-term
- HOA communities with no signage or enforcement
- Commercial lots with overnight vehicles that shouldn't be there
- Any property where you hear residents complaining about parking

You're already driving through {{contact.city}} every day. This is just about keeping your eyes open and sending a quick text when you see something.

Want to give it a shot?

Elliott
Axle Towing
480-288-5526 | info@axletowing.com
axletowing.com
steps.description: Day 4 - Explain how the referral program works step by step

steps.subject: Standing offer - parking referral bonuses
steps.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

Last note from me. No pressure at all -- I just wanted to make sure the offer is on your radar.

Any time you see a property in {{contact.city}} or anywhere in the Phoenix metro that looks like it has a parking problem, just text the property name and address to 480-288-5526. If it turns into a signed account, you get a referral bonus.

The offer doesn't expire. Whenever you're ready, we're here.

Elliott
Axle Towing
480-288-5526 | info@axletowing.com
axletowing.com
steps.description: Day 10 - Final low-pressure reminder with standing offer
